title: Keep compatibility aliases in the C++ ABI release gate
prompt: Repair the offline ABI release checker in `tools/check_abi.py`. A release is compatible only when every baseline public export is still present with the same kind, symbol version, default-version status, and compatibility-alias metadata, and every baseline C++ record layout is unchanged. Intentional compatibility aliases are public ABI entries in their own right: do not collapse an alias into its target or discard it as a duplicate. Additions are allowed. Keep the command-line interface and deterministic diagnostics intact. Do not modify the tests or fixtures. Verification must remain offline; success is `python3 -B -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' -v` from the repository root.
